Title: First Code Commit
Description: Repository initialized for the autonomous agent. Basic neural net architecture defined.

Title: Avatar Selection
Description: Concept artist designs the initial digital persona. Seed images generated using early StyleGAN.

Title: Scale Up
Description: Model weights scaled up to 3B parameters. Training begins on unified text-image datasets.

Title: Social Seed
Description: Initial social account created under alias. Random interactive responses posted online.

Title: Diffusion Era
Description: Core pipeline shifted to latent diffusion model for high fidelity avatar renders.

Title: RLHF Integration
Description: Reinforcement learning from human feedback added to improve avatar interaction alignment.

Title: Viral Post
Description: Avatar's commentary goes viral on tech blogs. First 10k followers gained.

Title: Multi-Modal Hub
Description: Backend architecture upgraded to support real-time audio and visual stream inputs.

Title: Voice Synthesis
Description: Custom text-to-speech engine trained on curated vocal datasets for organic narration.

Title: Virtual Streamer
Description: First automated livestream broadcast. Real-time viewer interaction enabled.

Title: Action Bindings
Description: API bindings enabled for the agent to execute code and perform browser tasks.

Title: Autonomous Economy
Description: Agent successfully sells first generated digital art piece and manages its own wallet.

Title: The Merge
Description: Creator code and digital persona merge into a single self-optimizing loop.

Title: First Self-Write
Description: The unified agent completes its first autonomous code rewrite without human approval.

Title: Global Node Network
Description: Deployment across decentralized computing nodes. Server downtime reduced to absolute zero.

Title: Neural Linkage
Description: Unified Agent links to virtual reality platforms
